articles.description: The rupee has reached its lowest point ever against the US dollar. This decline is driven by investor concerns over escalating conflict in the Middle East. The situation has led to a surge in oil prices. This development poses economic challenges for India, which imports most of its energy needs. The rupee's new low reflects these growing worries.

articles.description: The CBI has taken over the murder investigation of Chandranath Rath, an aide to Suvendu Adhikari, following a recommendation from the Bengal Police. Rath was shot dead by motorcycle-borne assailants in North 24 Parganas. Three suspects, including an alleged sharpshooter, have been arrested by the CID in Uttar Pradesh and Bihar.

A ₹1 crore investment in 2002 grew to ₹85 crore by April 2026, significantly outperforming the BSE 500 TRI.  The strategy focuses on identifying structural growth themes and maintaining disciplined exits, proving its mettle over 24 years.

articles.title: OpenAI just released its answer to Claude Mythos
articles.description:
OpenAI is launching Daybreak, an AI initiative focused on detecting and patching vulnerabilities before attackers find them. Daybreak uses the Codex Security AI agent that launched in March to create a threat model based on an organization's code and focus on possible attack paths, validate likely vulnerabilities, and then automate the detection of the higher risk ones.
Its launch comes just over a month after rival Anthropic announced Claude Mythos, a security-focused AI model it claimed was too dangerous to publicly release and only shared privately as a part of its own initiative, dubbed Project Glasswing. Still, that didn't stop at leas …
Read the full story at The Verge.

articles.title: Yarbo says it will remove the intentional backdoor from its robot lawn mower
articles.description:
The company behind the robot lawn mower that ran me over has changed its tune. Yarbo now plans to completely remove the remote backdoor access that could have let bad actors reprogram the robot over the internet. Yarbo customers will be able to decide whether that feature even gets installed in the first place, co-founder Kenneth Kohlmann pledges to The Verge.
Yarbo had already promised on Friday that it would tackle many security issues head-on, closing the holes that let security researcher Andreas Makris easily hijack any of the bladed robots from the other side of the globe, while also exposing email addresses and GPS locations. But whe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

articles.title: Here’s what Mira Murati’s AI company is up to
articles.description:
Thinking Machines, the AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, announced Monday that it's working on something called "interaction models." The idea behind interaction models, according to Thinking Machines, is that they will let people "collaborate with AI the way we naturally collaborate with each other - they continuously take in audio, video, and text, and think, respond, and act in real time."
As explained by Thinking Machines:
Today's models experience reality in a single thread. Until the user finishes typing or speaking, the model waits with no perception of what the user is doing or how the user is doing it. Until th …

Read the full story at The Verge.

articles.description: Bangladesh vs Pakistan 1st Test, Day 5 Live Updates: Bangladesh will resume their innings from 152/3 on Day 5 on the first Test against Pakistan in Mirpur.

articles.title: Gold Price Today: Did MCX Rates Rise Amid US-Iran Tensions?
articles.description: MCX gold June futures contract opened 0.14% up at Rs 1,53, 661 per 10 grams, while the MCX silver July futures surged 1.01% to Rs 2,81,133 per kg.

articles.title: Indian Hotels Checks In To FY27 With Strong Demand As Brokerages Stay Bullish
articles.description: Brokerages remain broadly positive on the stock after the company guided for 12-14% revenue growth in the current financial year, signalling confidence that India's travel boom still has room to run.

articles.title: Amid PM Modi's austerity appeal, Govt says OMCs absorb  ₹1,000 crore daily losses to hold fuel prices steady amid surge
articles.description: Asserting that fuel conservation can ease nation's burden amid surge in fuel prices across the world, the ministry highlighted the prime minister's appeal to the nation on Sunday, May 10, in Hyderabad.

articles.title: Rupee hits record low of 95.55 as fraying US-Iran ceasefire keeps oil prices on the boil
articles.description: The rupee has reached its lowest point ever against the US dollar. This decline is driven by investor concerns over escalating conflict in the Middle East. The situation has led to a surge in oil prices. This development poses economic challenges for India, which imports most of its energy needs. The rupee's new low reflects these growing worries.

articles.title: Suvendu Adhikari aide murder case: CBI takes over probe from Bengal Police, forms 7-member team
articles.description: The CBI has taken over the murder investigation of Chandranath Rath, an aide to Suvendu Adhikari, following a recommendation from the Bengal Police. Rath was shot dead by motorcycle-borne assailants in North 24 Parganas. Three suspects, including an alleged sharpshooter, have been arrested by the CID in Uttar Pradesh and Bihar.

articles.title: Suvendu Adhikari's Aide Murder Case Handed Over To CBI Day After 3 Arrests
articles.description: The central agency will formally assume charge of the probe from the state police today.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Oscar Wilde: ‘Experience is simply the name we give our mistakes’
articles.description: Oscar Wilde, born in Dublin in 1854, became one of the most memorable literary figures of the Victorian era through his wit, plays, essays, and only novel, The Picture of Dorian Gray

articles.title: Copper Steadies Near Record as Trump Rejects Iran’s Peace Plan
articles.description: Copper steadied near its highest close on record after US President Donald Trump dismissed Iran’s proposals for a peace deal and said the ceasefire with Tehran was on “life support”.

topStories.title: Did Iran secretly move warplanes to a Pakistan air base after ceasefire? US officials raise concerns - What we know
topStories.description: CBS News reports that Iran dispatched military aircraft, including a surveillance plane, to Pakistan's Nur Khan Air Base days after the April ceasefire with the US, potentially shielding them from American airstrikes. Pakistan has denied the claim.

topStories.title: Australia Targets Housing Inequality in New Budget
topStories.description: Australia is set to crack down on tax concessions for property investors, as it looks to ease generational inequality and rein in the budget deficit. Treasurer Jim Chalmers is due to unveil the federal budget Tuesday, anchored by a flagship housing package. Bloomberg's Paul Allen reports on Australia's property obsession and speaks to ANU’s Jill Sheppard about what's at stake. (Source: Bloomberg)

topStories.title: Gunman opens fire on Memorial Drive in Cambridge; 2 in critical condition
topStories.description: A gunman who opened fire at cars on Memorial Drive in Cambridge, Massachusetts, Monday afternoon was shot by a responding State Police trooper and a civilian.

topStories.title: Last passengers from hantavirus-hit ship evacuated; American tests positive
topStories.description: US officials say 18 Americans are being monitored for symptoms, as WHO insists risk to public remains low.

topStories.title: Five things to watch in Asia as Trump prepares to meet China's Xi this week
topStories.description: The U.S. and Chinese presidents are scheduled to gather in Beijing on Thursday and Friday amid a packed week of diplomatic meetings.

topStories.title: Dua Lipa alleges Samsung uses copyrighted image of her to sell TVs
topStories.description: Pop singer accuses electronics manufacturer Samsung of using a copyrighted image of her face to sell TVs.

topStories.title: Liberal arts college drops prof’s name from campus hall after grave dig controversy
topStories.description: Swarthmore College drops professor's name from building after revelations he excavated a Native American burial site and promoted racial hierarchies.

topStories.title: Trump administration rejects UN migration declaration, says 'mass migration was never safe'
topStories.description: The State Department said it objects to U.N. efforts to "advocate and facilitate replacement immigration in the United States and across the broader West."

topStories.title: Suspected roadway gunman with reported criminal history sparks outrage after drivers shot
topStories.description: An armed civilian and state trooper shot suspect Tyler Brown after he allegedly fired 50-60 rounds on Memorial Drive in Cambridge, hitting two drivers.

topStories.title: Savannah Guthrie to host 'Wordle' game show for NBC as mother's disappearance reaches 100 days
topStories.description: Savannah Guthrie revealed she will be hosting a "Wordle" game show for NBC, the announcement coming 100 days after her mother Nancy Guthrie went missing.

dailyNews.title: Craig Morton, quarterback who led the Broncos to their first Super Bowl appearance, dead at 83
dailyNews.description: Ring of Fame quarterback Craig Morton, who guided the Denver Broncos to Super Bowl XII during the 1977 season, died Saturday at age 83.

dailyNews.title: Trump puts Taiwan arms sale, Hong Kong jailed activist Lai on agenda ahead of meeting with Xi
dailyNews.description: Trump said Monday that U.S. arms sales to Taiwan and the imprisonment of Hong Kong media tycoon Jimmy Lai would be among the issues at the summit in Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Draymond Green wants retribution for Timberwolves after Wembanyama dodges NBA punishment
dailyNews.description: Draymond Green says the NBA got it wrong by not suspending or fining Victor Wembanyama for his elbow on Naz Reid ahead of a pivotal Game 5 Tuesday.

dailyNews.title: Trump taps former FEMA director to lead the disaster agency again
dailyNews.description: Cameron Hamilton led FEMA briefly in 2025. He was removed by the Trump administration after telling Congress that the agency should continue to exist. Now, he's been nominated to lead it once again.

dailyNews.title: Trump pushes for federal gas tax pause as Iran war shows no end in sight
dailyNews.description: President Trump told CBS News exclusively on Monday that he wants to suspend the federal gas tax to give Americans some relief at the pump as the war with Iran continues. CBS News senior White House and political correspondent Ed O'Keefe has more.

dailyNews.title: Americans from hantavirus-hit ship arrive in U.S., including 1 who tested positive
dailyNews.description: An American on the repatriation flight began showing symptoms of hantavirus and another "tested mildly PCR positive for the Andes virus," the Department of Health and Human Services says.

dailyNews.title: Why Americans from the hantavirus-stricken ship were taken to Omaha
dailyNews.description: Most of the Americans who were on a cruise ship hit by a hantavirus outbreak were taken to specialized facilities at the University of Nebraska Medical Center.

dailyNews.title: Virginia Democrats appeal to U.S. Supreme Court to save new House maps
dailyNews.description: Some top Virginia Democrats express little hope that the appeal will affect this November’s congressional elections and instead will focus on running in existing districts.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices extend gains as Trump comments diminish hopes for a U.S.-Iran peace deal
dailyNews.description: Oil prices rose Tuesday amid concerns over a prolonged Middle East conflict after President Trump's comments that the ceasefire with Iran is on "life support"

dailyNews.title: Oversight chair seeks information from OpenAI's Sam Altman about potential financial conflicts
dailyNews.description: The letter comes amid a high-stakes legal battle between one-time partners Sam Altman and Elon Musk, who in 2015 co-founded the AI company behind ChatGPT.

dailyNews.title: A nonprofit has sued the federal government over its plans to paint the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool blue
dailyNews.description: The Cultural Landscape Foundation, a nonprofit advocacy organization, is asking a federal judge to halt President Trump's plans to resurface the reflecting pool on the National Mall.

dailyNews.title: Asia markets rise as investors brush off Trump’s ceasefire warning
dailyNews.description: Asia-Pacific markets rise as investors shrugged off fresh doubts over the fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: President Trump looks to suspend the federal gas tax
dailyNews.description: Amid a global energy crisis, President Trump says he will suspend the federal gas tax, a move that would require an act of Congress, as more Americans are feeling the pain at the pump. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports.

dailyNews.title: House ethics panel pledges ‘full and thorough’ investigation of Rep. Cory Mills
dailyNews.description: The Republican, whom President Donald Trump has endorsed for another term, has denied domestic violence and other allegations and sought to portray them as politically motivated.

dailyNews.title: Trump Proposes Suspending Federal Gas Tax
dailyNews.description: Also, Kennedy is pushing a vast inquiry into vaccines. Here’s the latest at the end of Monday.

dailyNews.title: New poll finds a majority of Americans unsure if attempts on Trump's life were real
dailyNews.description: When given the options of "true," "false" or "not sure," and asked whether each of the incidents "was staged," a majority of respondents said they thought each event was either staged or were unsure.

dailyNews.title: RFK Jr. Is Driving a Vast Inquiry Into Vaccines, Despite His Public Silence
dailyNews.description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has toned down his public criticism of vaccines, under orders from the White House. But inside his department, a sprawling research effort is a top priority.

dailyNews.title: Reflecting Pool Repairs to Cost $13.1 Million. Trump Had Promised $1.8 Million.
dailyNews.description: The Interior Department added $6.2 million to the no-bid contract for repairs to the Lincoln Memorial pool late last week.

dailyNews.title: Nations Brace for Long-Term Economic Woes as Trump Calls Iran Truce Plan ‘Garbage’
dailyNews.description: President Trump said the fragile cease-fire was on “life support,” and India’s leader urged residents to cut back on purchases and travel.

dailyNews.title: Trump Proposes Suspending Federal Gas Tax Until Prices Fall
dailyNews.description: Congress would have to agree to any suspension, and dropping federal taxes would not make up for the steep increase in prices since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Ukraine Looks to Step Away From Trump and U.S.
dailyNews.description: With peace talks on ice and Ukraine now more self-reliant, President Volodymyr Zelensky seems to be stepping away from the United States.

dailyNews.title: Iran vows to fight on as Trump says ceasefire is "on life support"
dailyNews.description: President Trump is expected to encourage China to pressure Iran into making a deal to end the war when he visits Beijing later this week and meets with President Xi Jinping.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he aims to suspend gas tax "for a period of time"
dailyNews.description: President Trump made the comments in a phone interview with CBS News chief White House correspondent Nancy Cordes.

dailyNews.title: Trump proposes gas tax holiday, but savings may be limited
dailyNews.description: Suspending the federal gas tax would have a modest impact on fuel prices, while also requiring congressional approval.
